ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the market belongs to */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "avg_price_per_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the listing belongs to */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the listing (e.g., $0 - $149,999) */,
  "num_active" INTEGER /* Number of active listings */,
  "num_pending" INTEGER /* Number of pending listings */,
  "pending_ratio" REAL /* Pending ratio */,
  "expired_listings" INTEGER /* Number of expired listings */,
  "closings_last_six_months" INTEGER /* Number of closings in the last six months */,
  "avg_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average days on market */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_type" TEXT /* Type of listing (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Days on market */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, financed) */,
  "financing_terms" TEXT /* Financing terms (e.g., 30-year mortgage, 20% down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., agent, broker) */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the agent belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the trend belongs to */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the trend belongs to */,
  "avg_sales_price" REAL /* Average sales price */,
  "avg_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average days on market */,
  "sales_ratio" REAL /* Sales ratio */,
  "price_appreciation_rate" REAL /* Price appreciation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent accessing the data */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Type of data viewed (e.g., market trends, listings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the forecast belongs to */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_sales_price" REAL /* Forecasted average sales price */,
  "forecasted_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Forecasted average days on market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_forecasts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "sales_volume" REAL /* Total sales volume */,
  "average_days_to_close" INTEGER /* Average days to close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
